title: westphalina macrocarpa
intro: Westphalina macrocarpa is a plant species that belongs to the family Annonaceae and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Westphalina macrocarpa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
